titleStmt.title: Maṣḥafa zenāhomu la-ʾabaw
መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሆሙ፡ ለአበው፡
Maṣḥafa zenāhomu la-ʾabaw
Book of the History of the Fathers
Patericon Aethiopice

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea

listWit.witness: Vat. Aeth. 33fols 34r–52v (long fragment of the first part)
EMML 1536fols 3r–46v, (only similar in contents, followed by sayings of Pachomius, 46v–72v)
Frankfurt Or. 7fols 345r–351v (similar in contents but distinct from Maṣḥafa zenāhomu la-ʾabaw element TEI with id LIT2169Pateri)
Vat. Cerulli Etiopici 124 fols 7r and following (286 entry numbers)

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

t:abstract.t:p: 283 (450 numbered by the editor in Patericon Aethiopice. TextusCorpus Scriptorum Christianorum OrientaliumVictorArrasLouvainSecrétariat Du Corpus SCO1967Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium277, Scriptores Aethiopici, 53277, Scriptores Aethiopici, 53bm:Arras1967PatericonTextusbm:Arras1967PatericonTextus) apophtegmata and noteworthy episodes by different Church fathers.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:bibl.title: Un exemple typique des relations culturelles entre l'arabe-chrétien et l'éthiopien: Un Patericon récemment publié
IV Congresso Internazionale di Studi Etiopici (Roma, 10–15 April 1972)
Accademia Nazionale dei Lincei

series.title: Accademia Nazionale dei Lincei
series.biblScope: Anno 371, Problemi attuali di scienza e di cultura, 191

t:bibl.biblScope: Anno 371, Problemi attuali di scienza e di cultura, 191
